_meta.methodology: BUILD_PROCESS.md (brain -> skills -> 14-param -> modules/canonical -> principles -> implement -> tests -> verify); validated on the spine module
_meta.scope: engine-wide (all gen_ui staff pages); validated on school_onboarding_ops

title: Product hardening (Phase 2, generator CR): server-side list toolbars + clean columns across all kernel pages
business_reason: Phase-1 audit (reports/UI_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md) found only school_crm was a real screen; the other ~29 gen_ui pages had status chips + actions + create forms but universally lacked toolbars (filter/search/facet) and some surfaced system/normalized fields as columns/create inputs (P2.9). Fixing this per-page would be 29x throwaway work; the correct P0.6 fix is in the two generators so every page benefits at once.
brain_skills: Brain: 'complete' = user can SEE (list+status+filters) and ACT, not just an API. Skills: 03 Screen Contract, 13 UI Design System, 01 Spec Interpreter, 08 Security (masking on read unchanged), 17 Gap Detection.

param_14.question: Every kernel list page should be filterable/searchable/facetable and must not show or collect system/derived fields.
param_14.answer: gen_modules: emit a derived listConfig (filter on status + up to 2 enums, search on name/code/email/city columns, sort on created_at/status, facet+facetValues on the status enum, owner column if present) into each defineModuleService — the kernel already consumes it. gen_ui: render a toolbar (status facet + search + Newest sort) on staff pages with a status enum, and exclude system/derived fields (normalized_*, *_by, *_hash, idempotency) from columns AND create fields (P2.9/P2.4/P2.7).
param_14.answer_source: reports/UI_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md + CANONICAL_DATA_MODEL.json + server/lib/listQuery.ts (kernel already supports listConfig/facets)
param_14.data_entities: read-only over canonical columns to derive config; no schema change
param_14.workflow_entities: none (display/list only; lifecycle actions already present)
param_14.security_implications: masking still applied server-side on read (unchanged); search is over identifying text columns only (skips normalized); facets respect scope (facetCounts uses the scoped base + applicableFilters).
param_14.downstream_dependencies: one generator change regenerates ~29 service.ts + ~73 page.tsx at once (large diff); verification leans on tsc + the e2e suite + the onboarding browser journey.
param_14.assumptions: School pages are excluded from the auto-toolbar (their services may not carry listConfig); staff core+secondary pages do.

principles_pass.P0.6: built once into the shared generators/engine; every page benefits — not a per-page fork
principles_pass.P2.9: system/normalized fields removed from columns + create inputs
principles_pass.P1.x: status facet + search + sort = real list UX; status chips already present
principles_pass.P3.8: facets/filters respect staff scope via the kernel's scoped base query

functional: onboarding list returns facet counts when ?facet=onboarding_status (kernel listConfig)
page renders toolbar (search + status pills) + clean columns (no normalized_*)
facet pill click filters without error
security_owasp: masking unchanged on read; scope respected by facetCounts
regression: existing onboarding e2e (chain2 activate, onboarding_guard) still pass; 00/01/02 journeys still pass

verification: tsc clean across ~29 regenerated services + ~73 pages; e2e 6/6 (00/01/02/03 + chain2_activate + onboarding_guard); qa:summary pass 6/6. Also fixed a Windows EINVAL bug in scripts/qa/dev-server.js (spawn needs shell:true) surfaced by the fresh-server run.

increment_2_done.destructive_confirm: DONE — gen_ui emits reason/danger flags per action verb (REASON_VERBS/DANGER_VERBS); ModuleTable shows a confirm warning for danger actions and requires a reason before confirm (P1.6/P1.8). Validated by tests/e2e/04_onboarding_actions.
increment_2_done.core_service_listconfig: VERIFIED — all 57 pages with a toolbar have a service carrying listConfig; the only flag is school_crm (custom gen_actions page with its own LIST_CFG/toolbar — a false positive). No dead toolbars.

known_followups.detail_panels: 23 modules own >1 table and still lack detail/sub-collection panels (e.g. onboarding documents) — next hardening slice per module (needs sub-routes like CRM comms).
